tasks.title: Version canonical graph schema
acceptance: JSON schema defines project, nodes, ports, edges, evidence and provenance
Round-trip fixtures preserve every field
v1 migration and compatibility policy documented

tasks.title: Build Python and TypeScript static scanners
acceptance: Extract files, symbols, imports and calls from fixtures
Malformed files yield diagnostics without aborting scan
Generated/vendor/secret paths are excluded

tasks.title: Replace heuristics with configurable classification rules
acceptance: Layer and piece rules support defaults plus project overrides
Every classification carries confidence and reason
Unknown items remain visible and actionable

tasks.title: Add search, filters, focus and minimap
acceptance: Search focuses matching nodes
Layer/kind toggles update graph
Minimap and fit-to-selection work with keyboard

tasks.title: Scale renderer with clustering and instancing
acceptance: 5k-node fixture remains interactive
Clusters expand/collapse deterministically
Labels use level-of-detail

tasks.title: Harden privacy, accessibility and snapshot workflow
acceptance: No file body or secret path leaves browser
Snapshot import/export includes provenance
Keyboard, contrast and reduced motion checks pass

tasks.title: Define typed visual operations
acceptance: Create, delete, move, rename and connect operations are schema-valid
Operations are serializable and reversible
Domain layer has no renderer dependency

tasks.title: Implement snap and compatibility engine
acceptance: Compatible ports snap with visible feedback
Invalid connections explain the violated rule
Keyboard assembly is supported

tasks.title: Compile operations into deterministic change plans
acceptance: Same graph operation always produces same plan
Plan lists files, symbols, imports and tests impacted
No source file changes during planning

tasks.title: Add code templates and language adapters
acceptance: Python and TypeScript adapters implement create/rename/connect
Templates are project-overridable
Generated output formats cleanly

tasks.title: Build diff preview, validation and explicit apply
acceptance: Preview displays exact diff and impact
Apply requires explicit confirmation
Tests/build run and receipts are retained

tasks.title: Add checkpoints, undo and conflict recovery
acceptance: Every apply creates a checkpoint
Undo restores exact prior bytes
Concurrent disk changes stop apply with actionable conflict

tasks.title: Extract reusable canvas package
acceptance: Canvas mounts with injected graph/store APIs
No direct browser filesystem dependency
Web MVP consumes the package

tasks.title: Scaffold VS Code webview extension
acceptance: Command opens canvas for active workspace
Strict CSP and typed message protocol
Extension package builds locally

tasks.title: Synchronize editor and canvas selections
acceptance: Canvas selection opens exact symbol
Editor selection focuses matching piece
Missing/stale symbols degrade gracefully

tasks.title: Implement incremental workspace watcher
acceptance: Changed files rescan under 500ms warm
Graph state remains stable across refresh
Rename/delete events update edges

tasks.title: Guard extension apply service and package for Cursor
acceptance: Workspace trust and path boundaries enforced
Preview/apply/checkpoint works from webview
VSIX installs in VS Code and Cursor

tasks.title: Define AI intent and proposal contracts
acceptance: Intent, assumptions, operations, risks and evidence are typed
Model output cannot bypass operation validation
Provider interface supports local-first models

tasks.title: Build architecture explanation and impact assistant
acceptance: Answers cite graph nodes/edges
Uncertain claims are labeled
Impact analysis identifies affected tests and boundaries

tasks.title: Implement intent-to-graph proposal flow
acceptance: Natural-language request produces preview-only typed operations
User can accept/reject each operation
Invalid proposals never reach change planning

tasks.title: Generate tests and verify AI transformations
acceptance: Proposal includes tests before implementation
RED and GREEN evidence retained
Failed verification automatically rejects apply

tasks.title: Ship audit trail, onboarding and v1 release
acceptance: Every proposal/apply/undo is auditable
Guided sample teaches the visual grammar
Web and VSIX release artifacts pass full gates
